title: dactylorhiza × dinglensis subsp. grandis
intro: Dactylorhiza × dinglensis subsp. grandis, also known as the hybrid orchid, is a rare and unusual orchid plant that is a natural hybrid between Dactylorhiza sambucina and Coeloglossum viride. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × dinglensis subsp. grandis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the roots or flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
